summary: #95572 is the open canonical PR and should be repaired on the contributor branch before any merge path. Current main still has the reported parser behavior, the PR branch is maintainer-editable, but the hydrated preflight shows unresolved review comments and failing relevant checks, while close and merge are blocked by the job.

actions.reason: Already closed historical context; no mutation is valid or needed.

Repair the editable contributor PR branch, address review feedback, rebase if needed, rerun focused proof plus pnpm check:changed, then let the router run a fresh ClawSweeper/Codex review before any merge decision.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair #95572 in place by addressing the two review comments, keeping the parser fix limited to rejecting bind specs with extra colon segments, and rerunning focused parser coverage plus the changed-check gate.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(agents): reject bind specs with extra colon segments
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## What Problem This Solves
`openclaw agents bind --bind <channel>:<account>` currently accepts specs with extra colon segments on main because `parseBindingSpecs` uses `split(":", 2)`, silently truncating input such as `matrix:work:extra` to account `work`.

## Why This Change Was Made
Repair the existing contributor PR #95572 in place. Keep the fix in `parseBindingSpecs`, split bind specs fully, reject any extra segment with the same `Invalid binding "..."` phrasing used by the existing empty-account path, and adjust the nearby comment so it names the parser contract without a stale or vague validator reference.

## User Impact
Malformed bind specs with extra colon segments become explicit CLI errors instead of silently creating a different binding than the user requested.

## Evidence
- Current main `a1828110704fade5281dde8b0d2e305d5b23dd54` still has `trimmed.split(":", 2)` in `src/commands/agents.bindings.ts`.
- Hydrated #95572 is open, maintainer-editable, and already contains focused source/test changes by @ly-wang19.
- Address hydrated review comments on `src/commands/agents.bindings.ts` lines 320 and 326 before re-review.
- Run `pnpm test src/commands/agents.bind.matrix.integration.test.ts` and `pnpm check:changed` after repair.
credit_notes: Preserve @ly-wang19 as the source PR author for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/95572.
Any Clownfish repair commit should be limited to review feedback and validation repair on the contributor branch, not a replacement of the contributor's fix.
Release-note context belongs in the PR body or final squash message; do not edit CHANGELOG.md for this normal fix PR.
